channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: acknowledging health care's great divide
item.description: Podcast host Julie Rovner discusses politics in health care with policy expert.

item.title: In need of sun, rest and relaxation? Try this Mexican hotspot
item.description: Playa del Carmen offers a premier resort destination in the Riviera Maya.

item.title: Food stamp work rules don't increase employment, researchers say
item.description: Work requirements don't lower government spending or boost jobs, study finds.

item.title: Watch: acknowledging health care's great divide
item.description: Podcast host Julie Rovner discusses politics in health care with policy expert.

item.title: Study of 450k diets finds specific eating habit linked to cancer prevention
item.description: Yet another benefit of this particular dietary pattern.

item.title: Cravings, fatigue, and mood swings: what to eat each cycle phase
item.description: Permission to eat carbs and chocolate during menstrual cycle.

item.title: Medigap premiums leap, consumers have few alternatives
item.description: Supplemental insurance costs rise, leaving Medicare enrollees with limited options.

item.title: Food stamp work rules don't increase employment, researchers say
item.description: Work requirements don't lower government spending or boost jobs, study finds.

item.title: Adrian Owen and Faraz Shafaghi of Creyos on neurological testing
item.description: Interview with co-founders of cognitive assessment company.

item.title: Is this the part of endometriosis treatment we've been missing?
item.description: Research reveals how endometriosis changes the brain.

item.title: How women can prevent injury while weightlifting in their 40s and beyond
item.description: Certain fractures become much more common during perimenopause.

item.title: Dayne Williams of Quantum Health on care navigation
item.description: CEO came out of retirement to lead major health navigation company.

item.title: You don't need to suffer through hot flashes
item.description: Sudden heat, sweating, and red face can be managed with treatment.

item.title: What you need to know about dim light disturbances
item.description: Glaring dashboard lights at night can be disorienting and dangerous.

item.title: Philippe Pouletty, physician and founder of Carvolix
item.description: French venture capitalist and inventor discusses medical technology company.

item.title: How to avoid Shamea Morton's spa nightmare
item.description: Tips to prevent traumatic skincare experiences like Real Housewives star's lawsuit.

item.title: When I found out I was autistic, I stopped masking and started trusting myself
item.description: Personal essay for Autism Acceptance Month about embracing neurodiversity.

item.title: Your brain on a hot flash
item.description: First-person account of experiencing hot flashes during a work presentation.

item.title: Talking to your healthcare provider about vaccines
item.description: Personal story about chickenpox during pregnancy and vaccine discussions.

item.title: Peter Stetson, CMIO of TigerConnect, on AI platform
item.description: Connecting workflows between doctors, nurses, and EMTs using AI.
